input.content:
Subject: Welcome to [Platform Name]! Let's Get Started 🎉

---

Hi [Customer Name],

Welcome to [Platform Name]! 

We're thrilled to have you join our community of [X] users who are transforming the way they [key benefit]. Your account has been successfully created, and we're excited to help you get the most out of our platform.

GETTING STARTED

To help you hit the ground running, here are the first steps we recommend:

1. Complete Your Profile
   Visit your account settings and add a profile picture and company information. This helps our team better understand your needs and provide personalized support.
   [Link: Account Settings]

2. Explore the Dashboard
   Familiarize yourself with your main dashboard. This is where you'll find all the tools and features you need to [primary action].
   [Link: Dashboard Tutorial]

3. Integrate Your Tools (if applicable)
   Connect your favorite apps and tools to streamline your workflow. We support integrations with [Popular Tools].
   [Link: Integration Guide]

4. Check Out Our Knowledge Base
   Browse our comprehensive documentation and guides to learn about features, best practices, and troubleshooting.
   [Link: Help Center]

QUICK WINS

Here are a few things you can accomplish in the next 15 minutes:
• Set up your first [primary feature]
• Invite team members to collaborate
• Customize your preferences and notifications

NEED HELP?

We're here for you! If you have any questions or need assistance:
• 📧 Email us at support@[domain].com
• 💬 Chat with our support team (available 9 AM - 5 PM EST)
• 📚 Visit our Knowledge Base: [Link]
• 🎥 Watch quick start videos: [Link]

EXCLUSIVE OFFER

As a new member, you're eligible for [special offer or discount]. This offer is valid until [date].
[Claim Your Offer]

WHAT'S NEXT?

Check back next week for:
• Tips and tricks to maximize your productivity
• Updates on new features we're rolling out
• Success stories from customers like you

Thank you for choosing [Platform Name]. We can't wait to see what you'll accomplish!

Best regards,

The [Platform Name] Team
[Company Website]
[Social Media Links]

---

P.S. Follow us on [social media] for updates, tips, and announcements from our community.

P.P.S. Have feedback or feature requests? We'd love to hear from you at feedback@[domain].com

final_response:
Perfect! I've created a comprehensive welcome email template for your SaaS platform and saved it to `/workspace/welcome-email.txt`. 

The template includes:

✅ **Key sections:**
- Warm greeting and congratulations
- Getting Started guide (4 main steps)
- Quick Wins (fast actions they can take)
- Support resources and contact options
- Special offer for new members
- What's coming next

✅ **Professional elements:**
- Personalization placeholders (e.g., [Customer Name], [Platform Name])
- Clear ca
